name: Instant Camera
description:
/yHere's an instant camera to get you started!/x

Firstly, /wjust like a bundle/x, /winsert up to 12 slides/x (I recommend color slides.). 

Then /gright click/x to open the camera.

/gRight click/x again to take a picture.

Press /gSneak/x once to show some more controls, like adjusting the exposure setting! /i(Change that if pictures look bad.)/x
